title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Marriott India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Marriott India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Marriott India! We are hiring a Reservation Manager for our Nashik team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Marriott India:
Marriott India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Food Safety

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Marriott India!
